title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 644.117 - Small rural communities to have percentage of funds
text:
644.117.  Small rural communities to have percentage of funds. — Small rural communities, as defined by the commission by rule, shall receive at least twenty percent of the funds when no federal funds are included in grants or loans made pursuant to section 644.101.
(L. 1982 S.B. 646, A.L. 1987 H.B. 497)
